testcase.name: test_07_ocr_aadhaar_extraction
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_30_critical_flows.py:158: in test_07_ocr_aadhaar_extraction assert response.status_code == 200, f"Aadhaar extraction failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Aadhaar extraction failed: {"detail":"OCR processing failed: expected string or bytes-like object, got 'NoneType'"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_11_ocr_usage_counter_increments

failure.message: AssertionError: Usage should be at least 3, got 2 assert 2 >= 3

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_30_critical_flows.py:239: in test_11_ocr_usage_counter_increments assert usage >= 3, f"Usage should be at least 3, got {usage}" E AssertionError: Usage should be at least 3, got 2 E assert 2 >= 3

testcase.name: test_12_ocr_credits_badge_updates

failure.message: AssertionError: Remaining should be <= 97 after 3+ extractions, got 98 assert 98 <= 97

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_30_critical_flows.py:256: in test_12_ocr_credits_badge_updates assert remaining <= 97, f"Remaining should be <= 97 after 3+ extractions, got {remaining}" E AssertionError: Remaining should be <= 97 after 3+ extractions, got 98 E assert 98 <= 97
